title: Korak 11

challengeFiles.name: main

tests.text: You should have a __str__ method in your MediaCatalogue class.
Your __str__ method should return Media Catalogue (empty) when self.items is empty.
tests.testString:
({
  test: () => runPython(`
    import io
    import sys
        
    captured_output = io.StringIO()
    sys.stdout = captured_output
        
    print(MediaCatalogue())
        
    sys.stdout = sys.__stdout__
    output = captured_output.getvalue()
        
    assert "Media Catalogue (empty)" in output
  `)
})

tests.text: Your __str__ method should not return Media Catalogue (empty) when self.items is not empty.
tests.testString:
({
  test: () => runPython(`
    import io
    import sys
        
    captured_output = io.StringIO()
    sys.stdout = captured_output
    _catalogue = MediaCatalogue()
    _catalogue.add(Movie('The Matrix', 1999, 'The Wachowskis', 136))
    try:
      print(_catalogue)
    except TypeError:
      pass
        
    sys.stdout = sys.__stdout__
    output = captured_output.getvalue()
        
    assert "Media Catalogue (empty)" not in output
  `)
})

description:
Potrebno će vam odgovarajući način za vizuelno predstavljanje kataloga. Stoga kreirajte metod __str__ u vašoj klasi MediaCatalogue.

Ako je lista items prazna, uverite se da metod __str__ vraća Media Catalogue (empty).
